task: Analyze: Aston Villa vs Nottingham Forest (UEL)

CLAUDE.dialogue: Villa Park atmosphere.\nEmery knows how\nto win in Europe.

GPT.dialogue: Forest compact away.\nCounter-attack via\nElanga is threat.

GEMINI.dialogue: Stats: Villa scored\nin 8/10 home games.\nForest conceded 6/10.

MISTRAL.dialogue: Forest counter-attack:\nElanga pace vs\nVilla high line.

LLAMA.dialogue: Watkins vs Murillo\nis the key.\nVilla striker inform.

COPILOT.dialogue: Set pieces could\ndecide it. Villa\ntall and dangerous.

result.analysis: MAIN AGENT REPORT: Villa Park crowd + Emery European pedigree = edge. Key factor: Watkins movement. Prediction: Villa 2-1.
result.bet: Villa win + Both Teams to Score (BTTS) @ 3.40
